case_title: RAY CHAN VS. JOHN DOE I et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, RAY SERVED JAN-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DOE I
